//autogenerated by RSCG_Templating from file {{fileName}}
{{
func containsFolder(sv)
   lastIndex= sv.pathArr.size-1
   ret sv.pathArr[lastIndex-1] == "glinckerthesvg" 
end
}} 
{{ 
filterForFolder = pathFiles | array.filter @containsFolder
}}
// {{filterForFolder[0].pathArr}}
//Number icons glinckerthesvg {{filterForFolder.size }} 
namespace {{data.nameSpace}} {

	static partial class {{data.className}} {

		public static string[] IconNames = new []{
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
		"{{file.nameNoExt}}",
		{{end}}
		};


		public static global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto? FromName(string name){
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
		// {{ 
		result = file.namePascal
		}}
		if(string.Compare(name,"{{result}}",StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == 0)return {{result}};			
		if(string.Compare(name,"{{file.nameNoExt}}",StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) == 0)return {{result}};						
		{{ end }}
		//throw new global::System.ArgumentException($"Icon with name '{{name}}' not found in {{data.className}}");
		return null;
		}
	}
}
